item.name: Hermetic Tomestone
item.description: While it is a surpassingly small means of storing knowledge, the information deposited on this relic of Allagan society was compressed with heretofore unseen efficiency. Such a wealth of knowledge would not come without a sacrifice to portability, however, and this tomestone is unfathomably heavy as a result. This particular variety is not as highly sought as it once was, and may no longer be exchanged for other wares.
